title: Register Rust nodes with simulator before TX
description: The heterogeneous fleet Rust node uses lichen_embassy::sim::SimRadio::connect, which opens TCP but does not send the required simulator REGISTER message. The server rejects the first TX (0x10), causing zero Rust TX/RX and false interop failure. Add registered connection support with sim_id, node_id, and position, then verify Rust/Python fleet exchange.
close_reason: Added SimRadio REGISTER/OK handshake with an independent TCP framing test; hetero-node registers with sim/node IDs and position before TX; fleet script builds checked-in source to a pinned target, passes x-position, waits for Rust failures, and fails on zero Rust TX or zero fleet RX. Verified 2 Embassy sim tests, hetero-node cargo check, focused clippy, bash -n, local Python simulator registration/TX smoke, git diff --check, and three final reviews.
